notes:
The magicolor 2530 DL is a network color laser printer with a 2006 street price of $399 USD. This printer is supported by the foo2lava open software printer driver.

Consumables/Refills: Toner Black (4500 prints) - $79 Toner Yellow (4500 prints) - $119 Toner Magenta (4500 prints) - $119 Toner Cyan (4500 prints) - $119 Drum Cartridge (45000 prints) - $149 Part numbers: 1710587-004, 1710587-005, 1710587-006, 1710587-007, 1710591-001
